instruction: Open the 038 package-manifest capture row before editing any package-manifest evidence fields.
instruction_zh: 先打开 038 package manifest capture row，再编辑任何 package manifest 证据字段。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Open the cited source package file manifest row and verify source_id before copying evidence.
instruction_zh: 打开被引用的来源包文件 manifest 行，并在复制证据前核对 source_id。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Copy package_file_id and source_package_id only from the source package file manifest; leave evidence blank if no matching row is found.
instruction_zh: package_file_id 和 source_package_id 只能从来源包文件 manifest 复制；未找到匹配行时保持证据字段空白。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record file name, file kind, and source URL only from the source package file manifest.
instruction_zh: 文件名、文件类型和来源 URL 只能从来源包文件 manifest 记录。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record file size and download ID only from the source package file manifest and keep file_size_review_status not_started until reviewed.
instruction_zh: 文件大小和 download ID 只能从来源包文件 manifest 记录，并在复核前保持 file_size_review_status 为 not_started。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Keep checksum evidence blank unless a source-marked checksum is present; keep checksum_review_status not_started until reviewed.
instruction_zh: 除非有带来源标记的 checksum，否则保持 checksum 证据字段空白；复核前保持 checksum_review_status 为 not_started。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record commit policy and handling strategy only from the package manifest; do not infer repository safety from file size alone.
instruction_zh: 提交策略和处理策略只能从 package manifest 记录；不得仅凭文件大小推断仓库安全性。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record rights and review status only from the package manifest; do not turn them into a rights decision.
instruction_zh: 权利和复核状态只能从 package manifest 记录；不得把它们转换成权利决定。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Do not promote the source, package row, staging row, graph edge, component relation, or evolution relation from this checklist.
instruction_zh: 不得从本 checklist 提升来源、package row、staging row、图谱边、构件关系或演化关系。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Do not write a decipherment claim or AI hypothesis as scholarship from this checklist.
instruction_zh: 不得从本 checklist 写入释读声明，也不得把 AI 假说写成学术结论。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a file-size review, a checksum review, a storage-boundary review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.
